description: Structured stem: prose carries currency; inline_math carries algebra only (no $). Keep dialogue and equation in separate prose blocks so math is not inside quotes.

text_blocks.content: Penny Pincher laughs: 'You will never beat my prices! I sell at $14 per item. At the rival shop it is $8.50 per item with a $30 fee. For how many items do both cost the same?'
